metadata.description: Short workload prefix used in resource names.
Deployment environment name.
Azure region for all deployed resources.
Public URL for the main application. This is used for NEXTAUTH_URL and should match the Entra app registration redirect URI.
Microsoft Entra tenant ID for the web app registration.
Microsoft Entra client ID for the web app registration.
Microsoft Entra client secret for the web app registration.
Teams app package ID for the environment.
Teams bot app ID for the environment.
Teams tab SSO app ID used by webApplicationInfo.id.
API application ID URI used for Teams SSO/OBO. Leave blank to resolve at runtime.
Confidential app client ID used for Teams OBO flow. Leave blank to reuse azureAdClientId.
Confidential app client secret used for Teams OBO flow. Leave blank to reuse azureAdClientSecret.
Space-delimited least-privilege downstream scopes for Teams OBO.
Comma-delimited allowlist of accepted Teams SSO token audiences.
Random secret used by NextAuth to sign session cookies.
OpenAI API key for the current deployment.
MotherDuck MCP token used by the application runtime.
MotherDuck Business-plan admin token used only to create embed sessions for Dives.
Dedicated MotherDuck service-account username used for embedded Dive sessions.
Comma-separated list of allowed MotherDuck databases for runtime SQL access controls.
Default MotherDuck database used by prompts and MCP preflight checks.
Relative path in the app container for optional metadata context.
Administrator username for the Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server.
Administrator password for the Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server.
Database name used for report persistence.
Container image for the main web app.
Container image for the docs sidecar.
Optional tags applied to all resources.
Log Analytics retention in days.
Daily ingestion cap in GB for Log Analytics.
Application Insights ingestion sampling percentage.
Log Analytics retention in days.
Daily ingestion cap in GB for Log Analytics workspace.
Application Insights ingestion sampling percentage (1-100).
